title: MiCA Phase 2: Stablecoin Compliance
summary: ESMA issues final guidelines on asset-referenced tokens (ARTs) and electronic money tokens (EMTs).

title: SEC Enhancement of Clearing Agency Rules
summary: New requirements for Treasury clearing aiming to increase market resilience and transparency.

title: FCA Digital Securities Sandbox (DSS)
summary: First wave of institutional participants admitted to the sandbox for tokenized bond issuance.

title: BIS: Project Agorá Launch
summary: Major central banks and private financial institutions join forces to test tokenized wholesale move.
